instruction: Help me summarize the sales data

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Name'
ws['B1'] = 'January'
ws['C1'] = 'February'
ws['D1'] = 'March'
ws['A2'] = 'Zhang Wei'
ws['B2'] = 8500
ws['C2'] = 7200
ws['D2'] = 9100
ws['A3'] = 'Li Na'
ws['B3'] = 6800
ws['C3'] = 7500
ws['D3'] = 8300
ws['A4'] = 'Wang Qiang'
ws['B4'] = 9200
ws['C4'] = 8100
ws['D4'] = 7600
ws['A5'] = 'Zhao Min'
ws['B5'] = 7400
ws['C5'] = 8900
ws['D5'] = 6500
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/q1_sales.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me summarize the sales data
Find the employee with the highest total sales across three months from /home/user/Desktop/q1_sales.xlsx, append a line to /home/user/Desktop/sales_summary.txt: 'Q1 Top Sales: Wang Qiang', save
